title: sterculia abbreviata
intro: Sterculia abbreviata is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the sterculia or tree of heaven. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sterculia abbreviata are numerous, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and seeds are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues.
